forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KW267C7WHM0ETTDY64V1SDVY
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: bc80
+project: expect
+title: 'Delete ops: expectation/observation/golden delete'
+---
+## What
+Implement the `delete` cells of the domain grid (`ideas/expect.md` §"Operations"): `expectation delete`, `observation delete`, `golden delete`.
+
+- In `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/ledger.rs` + `tools/expect/mod.rs`:
+  - `expectation delete <scope>` — remove the `*.expect.md` spec AND its received observation AND its golden (the full identity-mirrored set). Per the design example flow ("remove spec + its observation + golden").
+  - `observation delete <scope>` — remove only the `.expect/received/<path>.received.json`.
+  - `golden delete <scope>` — remove only the `.expect/goldens/<path>.golden.json`.
+  - Resolve scope via the loader; operate on the mirrored paths. Safe: report what was removed; missing files are a no-op note, not an error.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `expectation delete src/checkout/coupon` removes the spec, its received, and its golden.
+- [ ] `observation delete` / `golden delete` remove only their respective artifact.
+- [ ] Deleting a non-existent artifact reports cleanly (no panic, no hard error).
+- [ ] Each op returns a structured summary of what was removed.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/ledger.rs` tests on a fixture repo: full delete removes all three; scoped deletes remove only one; missing-artifact no-op.
+- [ ] Tools op tests for the three delete ops.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect delete` passes.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,6 +1,23 @@
 ---
 assignees:
 - claude-code
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw48jw1agz2zrbyycpq7f6hz
+  text: |-
+    Implemented the three delete ops (TDD).
+
+    Engine (crates/swissarmyhammer-expect):
+    - observe.rs: added pub `spec_path(repo_root, identity)` mirroring received_path/golden_path; refactored the safe-join traversal guard into shared `validate_identity` reused by all three resolvers. Added spec_path layout + traversal tests.
+    - ledger.rs: added `Artifact` enum (Spec/Received/Golden) with private `path()` routing to the safe-join resolvers, `RemovedArtifact` and `DeletionSummary` serde DTOs, and `delete_expectation`/`delete_observation`/`delete_golden` over shared `delete_artifacts` + `remove_if_present` (missing file = Ok(false) no-op, never error). Added ledger tests: full delete removes all 3 legs in mirror order; scoped deletes remove only their leg (table-driven); missing-artifact clean no-op.
+    - lib.rs: re-exported the new items.
+
+    Tools (swissarmyhammer-tools .../expect/mod.rs): added `delete_op` shared handler (fn-pointer DeleteFn), op-id consts, dispatch wiring for the pre-existing Delete op structs, IMPLEMENTED_OPS update, and tool-level tests (full delete, scoped-only, missing no-op).
+
+    double-check flagged that a bare delete (no scope/tag) resolves to "all specs" and would nuke every expectation/observation/golden. Added a refusal guard in delete_op (invalid_params unless scope or tag is given) + a regression test asserting nothing on disk is touched. Read/idempotent ops keep the no-scope=all behavior.
+
+    Verify: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect -p swissarmyhammer-tools -E 'test(delete) or test(ledger) or test(expect)'` => 150 passed. `cargo check --workspace` ok. clippy -D warnings clean. fmt applied. Left in doing for /review.
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T10:04:12.714681+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW267C7WHM0ETTDY64V1SDVY
 position_column: doing
